author: y4rr
content: Round 1: SSD300 (3 bugs — dilation drop in ConvBnRelu, ceil_mode drop in max_pool2d, anchor step formula) + DeepLabV3 (1 bug in shared ferrotorch-nn Module::named_descendants_dyn — leading-dot caused silent BN buffer skip for transparent-wrapper modules; FCN unaffected because non-transparent backbone). Round 2: 5 orphaned conformance tests fixed (post-#1141 1-D scores contract); HF re-uploads verified for all 5 ferrotorch/<model> repos with matching registry pins. 5/5 PASS.
